description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored wood or composite panels, contrasted by dark trim around the roof and windows. The front facade features a series of large, floor-to-ceiling windows and a sheltered porch area, providing ample natural light and a welcoming entrance. The rear and side elevations are more private, with fewer and smaller windows, and a single main door visible on one side. The structure sits on a paved base surrounded by a circular patch of grass, with walkways leading to the entrances. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban or suburban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, light wood paneling, and large front windows, set on a paved base with surrounding grass.
description_view_0: Side view showing a single door and minimal windows, with light wood paneling and dark roof trim.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting large, floor-to-ceiling windows and a sheltered porch area, creating an open and inviting facade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a mix of large and small windows, and a paved walkway leading to the entrance.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring a small set of steps and a single door, with minimal window openings and a private appearance.
